basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST & women and 3 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Genetics and Plant Breeding/Biotechnology with 4/5 years bachelor’s degree. Those with 3 years bachelor’s degree must have UGC/CSIR/ICAR NET qualification or equivalent or Ph.D. in any of above disciplines
qualification.details: Master’s degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Genetics and Plant Breeding/Biotechnology with 4/5 years bachelor’s degree. Those with a 3 years bachelor’s degree must have UGC/CSIR/ICAR NET qualification or equivalent or Ph.D. in any of the above disciplines. Desirable: Experience in the use of molecular markers and Bioinformatics skills.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Research Fellow (SRF) in Molecular Breeding project entitled “Molecular breeding for improvement of tolerance to biotic and abiotic stresses, yield and quality traits in crops (Mustard)”
Senior Research Fellow (SRF) in ICAR Funded project entitled “Incentivizing Research in Agriculture (Mustard)”

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICAR IARI Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts is 09-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position announced by the Indian Agricultural Research Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the SRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master’s degree in Genetics/Plant Breeding/Genetics and Plant Breeding/Biotechnology with a 4/5 years bachelor’s degree, or equivalent qualifications as specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts is 35 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the SRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37000 plus 30% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ICAR IARI SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the ICAR IARI SRF posts?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application and required documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Does ICAR IARI offer age relaxation for any categories?
faq.answer: Yes, ICAR IARI offers age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST & women and 3 years for OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, which will provide all the detailed information.
